requirement_topic.en: Cell and Module Safety — IEC 62619 as International Baseline for Liberia BESS Donor-Project Acceptance
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯和模组安全——IEC 62619作为利比里亚BESS捐助方项目验收的国际基准
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯和模組安全——IEC 62619作為賴比瑞亞BESS捐助方項目驗收的國際基準

summary.en: Liberia does not currently have a confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation equivalent to Saudi Arabia's SABER/IEC 62619 route, the EU Battery Regulation, or comparable mandatory certification regimes. The National Standards Laboratory (NSL) of Liberia is the national standards body; however, its BESS-specific mandatory product scope has not been confirmed from publicly accessible official sources as of the dataset date. Exporters must verify the current NSL regulated-product list directly with NSL before shipment. Despite the absence of a confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation, IEC 62619 (Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications) is the internationally expected safety standard for lithium BESS cells and modules, and it is the baseline required by USAID, World Bank, IFC, and other international donors financing BESS projects in Liberia. Donor-project technical specifications and procurement frameworks for Liberia BESS installations are expected to require IEC 62619 compliance as a minimum technical prerequisite for equipment acceptance. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 are not accepted as IEC 62619 equivalents in international donor-project specifications.
summary.zh: 利比里亚目前尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规，与沙特阿拉伯SABER/IEC 62619路径、欧盟《电池法规》或类似强制认证制度相当。利比里亚国家标准实验室（NSL）是国家标准机构；然而，其BESS专项强制产品范围尚未从公开可获取的官方来源得到确认，截至本数据集日期如此。出口商在出货前须直接向NSL核实现行NSL受监管产品清单。尽管尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规，IEC 62619（工业应用二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）仍是锂BESS电芯和模组的国际预期安全标准，并且是USAID、世界银行、IFC及其他在利比里亚资助BESS项目的国际捐助方所要求的基准。利比里亚BESS装置的捐助方项目技术规格和采购框架预计将以IEC 62619合规作为设备验收的最低技术前提。中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023在国际捐助方项目规格中不被接受为IEC 62619的等效依据。
summary.zht: 賴比瑞亞目前尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規，與沙特阿拉伯SABER/IEC 62619路徑、歐盟《電池法規》或類似強制認證制度相當。賴比瑞亞國家標準實驗室（NSL）是國家標準機構；然而，其BESS專項強制產品範圍尚未從公開可獲取的官方來源得到確認，截至本數據集日期如此。出口商在出貨前須直接向NSL核實現行NSL受監管產品清單。儘管尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規，IEC 62619（工業應用二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）仍是鋰BESS電芯和模組的國際預期安全標準，並且是USAID、世界銀行、IFC及其他在賴比瑞亞資助BESS項目的國際捐助方所要求的基準。賴比瑞亞BESS裝置的捐助方項目技術規格和採購框架預計將以IEC 62619合規作為設備驗收的最低技術前提。中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023在國際捐助方項目規格中不被接受為IEC 62619的等效依據。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (internationally expected baseline for BESS cell/module safety in Liberia donor-project specifications)
IEC 62133-2:2017 — Safety Requirements for Portable Sealed Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries (may be referenced for smaller BESS modules in off-grid or mini-grid project specifications)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (expected system-level safety reference in donor-funded project specifications)
NSL — National Standards Laboratory of Liberia (verify current regulated product list directly; BESS-specific mandatory regulation not confirmed as of dataset date)

summary.en: China's primary mandatory standard for BESS cells from August 2025 is GB 44240-2024 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements), which replaces the prior GB/T 36276 series as the mandatory safety baseline for large-format BESS batteries over 100 kWh. The prior voluntary standard GB/T 36276-2023 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage) provides the technical framework for cells, modules, and battery clusters used in EES. These Chinese standards are not accepted as equivalents to IEC 62619 in Liberia donor-project specifications or international procurement frameworks. Exporters must obtain IEC 62619 test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory in addition to any Chinese GB compliance. Furthermore, IEC 62619 testing does not address 60 Hz grid integration; separate PCS 60 Hz reconfiguration and testing is required independently of cell-level safety certification.
summary.zh: 自2025年8月起，中国BESS电芯的主要强制性标准为GB 44240-2024（电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成为100 kWh以上大型BESS电池的强制性安全基准。此前的自愿性标准GB/T 36276-2023（电化学储能用锂离子电池）为EES中使用的电芯、模组和电池簇提供技术框架。上述中国标准不被利比里亚捐助方项目规格或国际采购框架接受为IEC 62619的等效依据。出口商除中国GB合规外，还须从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62619测试证据。此外，IEC 62619测试不涉及60 Hz电网集成；PCS 60 Hz重新配置和测试须独立于电芯级安全认证另行进行。
summary.zht: 自2025年8月起，中國BESS電芯的主要強制性標準為GB 44240-2024（電化學儲能系統用二次鋰電池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成為100 kWh以上大型BESS電池的強制性安全基準。此前的自願性標準GB/T 36276-2023（電化學儲能用鋰離子電池）為EES中使用的電芯、模組和電池簇提供技術框架。上述中國標準不被賴比瑞亞捐助方項目規格或國際採購框架接受為IEC 62619的等效依據。出口商除中國GB合規外，還須從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62619測試證據。此外，IEC 62619測試不涉及60 Hz電網集成；PCS 60 Hz重新配置和測試須獨立於電芯級安全認證另行進行。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子电池 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage; voluntary, effective July 1, 2024)

gap.en: Critical gap: Liberia donor-project owners (USAID, World Bank, IFC) and international EPCs reference IEC 62619 as the expected safety evidence for BESS cells and modules. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 are not harmonised with IEC 62619 and are not accepted as substitutes in international procurement specifications. Exporters should: (a) verify the current NSL regulated-product list for any mandatory pre-shipment conformity obligation; (b) obtain IEC 62619 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for cells and modules supplied to Liberia BESS projects; (c) confirm the applicable IEC 62619 edition referenced in the donor project specification before committing to a test programme; (d) note that IEC 62619 cell-level safety certification is a separate requirement from 60 Hz PCS reconfiguration — both are required and neither substitutes for the other; (e) for mini-grid and off-grid applications, also confirm whether IEC 62133-2 or additional donor-specified standards apply to smaller BESS modules or battery packs in the project scope.
gap.zh: 关键差距：利比里亚捐助方项目业主（USAID、世界银行、IFC）和国际EPC承包商将IEC 62619作为BESS电芯和模组的预期安全证据。中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未与IEC 62619协调，不被国际采购规格接受为替代依据。出口商应：（a）核实现行NSL受监管产品清单，确认是否存在强制装运前合格评定义务；（b）从ILAC认可实验室取得供应至利比里亚BESS项目的电芯和模组的IEC 62619型式试验证书；（c）在启动测试计划前确认捐助方项目规格中引用的IEC 62619版本；（d）注意IEC 62619电芯级安全认证与60 Hz PCS重新配置是独立要求——两者均须满足，互不替代；（e）对于微电网和离网应用，还须确认IEC 62133-2或其他捐助方指定标准是否适用于项目范围内较小的BESS模组或电池包。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距：賴比瑞亞捐助方項目業主（USAID、世界銀行、IFC）和國際EPC承包商將IEC 62619作為BESS電芯和模組的預期安全證據。中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未與IEC 62619協調，不被國際採購規格接受為替代依據。出口商應：（a）核實現行NSL受監管產品清單，確認是否存在強制裝運前合格評定義務；（b）從ILAC認可實驗室取得供應至賴比瑞亞BESS項目的電芯和模組的IEC 62619型式試驗證書；（c）在啟動測試計畫前確認捐助方項目規格中引用的IEC 62619版本；（d）注意IEC 62619電芯級安全認證與60 Hz PCS重新配置是獨立要求——兩者均須滿足，互不替代；（e）對於微電網和離網應用，還須確認IEC 62133-2或其他捐助方指定標準是否適用於項目範圍內較小的BESS模組或電池包。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in donor-project practice where USAID, World Bank, IFC, or project-owner specifications require IEC 62619 compliance; NSL mandatory regulatory obligation for BESS has not been confirmed — verify directly with NSL
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 44240-2024 is a mandatory national standard (GB designation) for lithium BESS cells over 100 kWh, effective August 1, 2025; GB/T 36276-2023 is voluntary; neither is accepted as equivalent to IEC 62619 in Liberia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation has been identified for Liberia as of the dataset date; however, IEC 62619 is the internationally expected technical baseline for BESS cell and module safety in donor-funded project specifications (USAID, World Bank, IFC) operating in Liberia. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 certification alone is not sufficient for Liberia donor-project acceptance. Verify NSL current regulated-product scope and confirm IEC 62619 evidence requirements with the project owner and donor before shipment. Note separately that 60 Hz PCS reconfiguration and testing is an independent technical requirement that must be addressed in parallel — IEC 62619 cell safety certification does not cover grid-integration compliance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至本数据集日期，利比里亚尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规；然而，IEC 62619是在利比里亚运营的捐助方资助项目规格（USAID、世界银行、IFC）中BESS电芯和模组安全的国际预期技术基准。仅持有中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023认证不足以满足利比里亚捐助方项目验收要求。出货前请核实NSL现行受监管产品范围，并向项目业主和捐助方确认IEC 62619证据要求。另请注意，60 Hz PCS重新配置和测试是须同步处理的独立技术要求——IEC 62619电芯安全认证不涵盖电网集成合规。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至本數據集日期，賴比瑞亞尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規；然而，IEC 62619是在賴比瑞亞運營的捐助方資助項目規格（USAID、世界銀行、IFC）中BESS電芯和模組安全的國際預期技術基準。僅持有中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023認證不足以滿足賴比瑞亞捐助方項目驗收要求。出貨前請核實NSL現行受監管產品範圍，並向項目業主和捐助方確認IEC 62619證據要求。另請注意，60 Hz PCS重新配置和測試是須同步處理的獨立技術要求——IEC 62619電芯安全認證不涵蓋電網集成合規。
